title: Malty Crunchy Ukrainian Barbeque Grill
description: A hearty, satisfying Ukrainian-inspired dish for date-night, featuring a rich, malty flavor and crunchy texture, all in a smoky barbeque sauce.

ingredients.name: Pumpernickel bread
ingredients.notes: use a day-old bread to get the crunch right

ingredients.name: Gravlax
ingredients.notes: smoked salmon is a staple in Ukrainian cuisine

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: balances out the tanginess of the BBQ sauce

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the barbeque sauce, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, paprika, and black pepper.
Add the sliced onions to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
Thread the pumpernickel bread cubes and gravlax slices onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
